provides.name: semantic-retrieval-adapter search
provides.summary: Local-first Ollama embedding provider for citation-bearing OpenClerk semantic_search.

provides.name: ollama-embeddings
provides.summary: Optional module skill for installed Ollama semantic retrieval.

artifacts.cache: rebuildable user-cache artifact outside committed repo

steps: Install semantic-retrieval-adapter separately from OpenClerk core.
Install modules/ollama-embeddings/skill/ollama-embeddings/SKILL.md only when the host opts into the Ollama module skill.
Register the module with openclerk module install_module and this manifest.
Configure ollama_url and embedding_model through openclerk module configure_module.
install.uninstall: Run openclerk module remove_module for provider ollama, then remove the adapter binary, optional skill, and user-cache directory without changing OpenClerk core.

compatibility.openclerk_runner: routes explicit retrieval semantic_search through verified module registration
compatibility.search_default: does not replace openclerk retrieval search or promote default semantic ranking
compatibility.schema: returns the shared openclerk_semantic_retrieval.v1 contract with citations
